scripts.supabase:gen: npx supabase gen types typescript --schema public --local > frontend/src/supabase/database.types.ts
scripts.supabase:types: npm run clean && npm run supabase:gen
scripts.supabase:restart: npm run email:build && supabase stop && supabase start
scripts.email:build: mkdir -p supabase/templates && mjml supabase/templates/src/magic-link.mjml -o supabase/templates/magic-link.html && mjml supabase/templates/src/confirmation.mjml -o supabase/templates/confirmation.html
